current_task.reason: base-station/OpenClaw can use /control, /video, and /audio with the robot; OpenClaw can inspect runtime/latest.jpg and provide image-content feedback

T05.summary: SUCCESS, RAM 15.9%, Flash 29.4%; compile-safe; hardware H deferred until split envs complete (now done)

T06.summary: docs/project_status_2026-06-26.md contains fresh results and hardware loop evidence

T07.summary: robot/mergetesting/src/config.local.h exists with WiFi/base-station settings; git check-ignore confirms not committed

T08.summary: Server listened on TCP 8765; logged Robot connected and device.hello from xiaoan_robot_01

T09.command: pio run -e mergetesting_display_only -t upload; OTA split-env uploads
T09.summary: USB recovery on COM19 when needed; later espota Result: OK for cam-only, mic-only, and speaker-only OTA targets

T10.summary: Serial showed Control connected, Sent device.hello, Heartbeat; server logged repeated Robot connected: xiaoan_robot_01

T11.summary: command.ack ok; user confirmed physical display/expression change on split env bring-up

T12.command: python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 motion move_out_of_dock --speed 0.15 --distance-cm 1 --timeout-ms 250; motion stop; motion move_back_to_dock
T12.summary: After LEDC channel fix (4-7), ack and motion.completed shared action_id; user confirmed physical direction and stop

T13.command: pio run -e mergetesting_speaker_only_ota -t upload --upload-port 192.168.137.114; python tools/send_robot_command.py local care_01
T13.summary: Lazy I2S fix resolved TG1WDT; audio.play_local and mock audio.play_tts ack ok with continuing heartbeats; user confirmed audible output

T14.command: pio run -e mergetesting_face240_only -t upload; python tools/send_robot_command.py expression caring; expression idle
T14.summary: 2.4 inch face240 expression path verified without watchdog reset; user confirmed face change

T15.summary: Server logged /video, camera=cam_ok, Video meta 320x240; runtime/latest.jpg updated with valid JPEG SOI/EOI

T16.summary: Server logged audio.chunk_meta pcm_s16le 16kHz mono; runtime/audio_stats.json and latest_audio.pcm updated; control not starved during PCM stream

T17.command: pio run -e mergetesting_full_face240 -t upload --upload-port COM19; python tools/send_robot_command.py --device-id xiaoan_robot_01 motion move_out_of_dock --bench --speed 1.0 --timeout-ms 5000
T17.summary: Added mergetesting_full_face240 and mergetesting_full_face240_ota. Full build and OTA passed on 2026-06-26. Rechecked on 2026-06-27 after hotspot recovery: full speaker/display/video/audio passed. Motor-only confirmed full-speed 5s forward after bench command clamping was understood. Full face240 was USB-flashed on COM19 at 460800 after 921600 proved unstable, then /control,/audio,/video all reconnected from 192.168.137.25. Full motion command ran from 17:43:43.088 to 17:43:48.121 with command.ack and motion.completed success; user confirmed physical forward movement.

T18.command: pio run -e mergetesting_full_face240 -t upload --upload-port COM19; local runner sent move_out_of_dock speed=0.56 duration_ms=2000 and waited for matching motion.completed; then turn left speed=0.56 duration_ms=500; display.expression happy; audio.play_local care_01
T18.summary: Local final demo passed on 2026-06-27 with mergetesting_full_face240: /control,/video,/audio connected; latest.jpg and latest_audio.pcm updated; forward and left turn were sequenced by matching action_id/motion.completed, not fixed sleeps; user confirmed physical forward movement, left turn, expression change, and audible care_01. Motor calibration: speed below about 0.5 is unreliable; speed=0.56 duration_ms=2000 is the demo forward setting; speed=0.8 also moved after battery/power recovery. audio.play_tts remains mock tone, not spoken TTS; reliable audible cue is audio.play_local care_01. After config.local.h was updated for DK2500 IP, mergetesting_full_face240 was USB-flashed again on COM19. DK2500/OpenClaw handoff reached display.expression happy and motion=turn, but DK2500 did not observe motion.completed for manual-turn-left-2318 before reconnects; next split is direct tools/send_robot_command.py on DK2500 vs ESP32 serial completed vs OpenClaw waiting layer.

T19.command: base-station/OpenClaw live run using robot /control, /video, and /audio; OpenClaw inspected runtime/latest.jpg and returned image-content feedback
T19.summary: On 2026-06-28 the base/OpenClaw side was reported working over all three live robot channels: /control can command the robot, /video updates runtime/latest.jpg from the robot camera, /audio reaches the base/OpenClaw side, and OpenClaw can inspect latest.jpg and provide feedback about the image content. Next gate is a reproducible DK2500 smoke script plus consistent motion.completed action_id verification before chaining autonomous movement.

next_order: Write/run DK2500 OpenClaw smoke script that verifies /control,/video,/audio, latest.jpg feedback, and one safe action
Verify OpenClaw receives matching motion.completed for each motion action_id before chaining movement
Implement or clearly defer real spoken TTS; keep audio.play_local care_01 as reliable demo sound
Build first autonomous care loop: camera/audio observation -> OpenClaw decision -> expression/motion/audio action
